name: DoorDash, Inc.
summary: DoorDash, Inc. operates local commerce platforms including the DoorDash Marketplace, Wolt Marketplace, and Deliveroo Marketplace across over 40 countries, connecting merchants, consumers, and Dashers. The company offers on-demand delivery, advertising services, consumer membership programs (DashPass, Wolt+, Deliveroo Plus), and a Commerce Platform providing white-label delivery (Drive), online ordering, branded mobile apps, reservation management, tableside ordering, and customer support tools for merchants.

products.name: DoorDash Marketplace
products.description: On-demand local delivery marketplace connecting merchants, consumers, and Dashers in the US and internationally.

products.name: Wolt Marketplace
products.description: International on-demand delivery marketplace operating in multiple countries.

products.name: Deliveroo Marketplace
products.description: International on-demand delivery marketplace operating in multiple countries.

products.name: Commerce Platform
products.description: Suite of services helping merchants build, operate, and grow businesses on their own channels.

products.name: Drive
products.description: White-label delivery fulfillment service for merchants operating on their own channels.

products.name: DashPass
products.description: Consumer membership program reducing delivery and service fees with additional benefits.

products.name: Wolt+
products.description: Consumer membership program on the Wolt Marketplace reducing fees and providing benefits.

products.name: Deliveroo Plus
products.description: Consumer membership program on the Deliveroo Marketplace reducing fees and providing benefits.
